ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Short code for the country (e.g., AFG for Afghanistan) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year for which nutrition data is available */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for which nutrition data is available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Full name of the data source */,
  "source_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the data source (e.g., FAO for Food and Agriculture Organization) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annually, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caloric_intake_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the caloric intake category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kcal, kJ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_data" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the nutrition data is available */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which the nutrition data is available */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the nutrition data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caloric intake category */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the nutrition data point */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source for verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES caloric_intake_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, health expert) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the nutrition data */,
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrition data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the nutrition data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nutrition_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrition_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the demographic data is available */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the country */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Gender ratio (e.g., 1.05 males per female) */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population (e.g., percentage of population in different age groups) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the economic indicator is available */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient, which measures income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country for which the health outcome is available */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the country */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate of the country */,
  "maternal_mortality_rate" REAL /* Maternal mortality rate of the country */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate for key diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrition data being validated */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the validation */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_nutrition_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrition_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data ("nutrition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrition data being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the nutrition data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_nutrition_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrition_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data ("nutrition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditing" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutrition data being audited */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the audit */,
  "audit_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the audit process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auditing_nutrition_id FOREIGN KEY ("nutrition_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data ("nutrition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for which the metadata is available */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., data collection method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata (e.g., survey) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source for verification */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES nutrition_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caloric_intake_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caloric intake category for which the metadata is available */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., unit of measurement) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata (e.g., kcal) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source for verification */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caloric_intake_metadata_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES caloric_intake_categories ("category_id")
)
